channel.title: Moiz's Morning Brief
channel.description: A daily 10-minute personal news brief covering Al Jazeera top stories, market moves on a personal watchlist, and new-episode summaries from a hand-picked set of podcasts.
channel.itunes:author: Moiz
channel.itunes:summary: World news, markets, and what's new in your shows.

item.title: Morning Brief — 2026-05-13
item.description: A daily 10-minute personal news brief covering Al Jazeera top stories, market moves on a personal watchlist, and new-episode summaries from a hand-picked set of podcasts.
item.itunes:author: Moiz
